Hero.subtitle: We are the architects of your global expansion. A boutique advisory firm for founders who have outgrown their geography.

NotFound.subtitle: Destination Unknown
NotFound.description: It looks like you've navigated off the map. This route might be under construction or doesn't exist in our immigration catalog.

Tools.hub_subtitle: Self-assessment tools to help you understand your immigration options before booking a consultation.
Tools.express_entry_desc: Estimate your CRS score, identify which 2026 category draws you qualify for, and get ranked pathway recommendations tailored to your profile.

ExpressEntry.page_subtitle: Estimate your CRS score and discover your best pathways to Canadian permanent residence.
ExpressEntry.spouse_coming: Will your spouse or common-law partner come with you to Canada?
ExpressEntry.age_note: Must be 17 or older to apply
ExpressEntry.edu_two_plus: Two or more degrees (one must be 3+ years)
ExpressEntry.no_second_lang: I have not taken a second language test
ExpressEntry.canadian_exp_label: Years of skilled Canadian work experience (in the last 10 years)
ExpressEntry.foreign_exp_label: Years of skilled foreign work experience (outside Canada)
ExpressEntry.cert_label: Do you have a certificate of qualification (trades)?
ExpressEntry.cert_note: A certificate of qualification in a trade occupation issued by a Canadian province or territory.
ExpressEntry.pnp_label: Do you have a provincial nomination?
ExpressEntry.pnp_note: A nomination from a Canadian province or territory through a Provincial Nominee Program (PNP). Adds 600 CRS points.
ExpressEntry.job_offer_label: Do you have a valid job offer from a Canadian employer?
ExpressEntry.job_offer_removed_note: As of March 25, 2025, IRCC removed arranged employment points from the CRS. A job offer is no longer counted in your score. This field is for your records only — it will not affect your result.
ExpressEntry.sibling_label: Do you have a sibling in Canada?
ExpressEntry.sibling_note: A brother or sister who is a Canadian citizen or permanent resident (18+). Adds 15 points.
ExpressEntry.french_note: Enter your TEF Canada or TCF Canada results. NCLC 7+ in all four abilities may add 25–50 bonus CRS points.
ExpressEntry.job_offer_zero_note: Removed by IRCC effective March 25, 2025 — no points awarded.
ExpressEntry.cutoff_caution: Cut-offs change every draw. Verify current cut-offs on the official IRCC rounds of invitations page before making any decisions.
ExpressEntry.disclaimer: This tool provides general information only. It is not legal advice and is not a substitute for a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant (RCIC) or immigration lawyer. CRS scores are estimates based on the rules version shown below — they may differ from official IRCC calculations. Cut-off scores change with every draw. The only authoritative source for Express Entry is IRCC / canada.ca.
ExpressEntry.no_category_match: Based on your profile, you do not currently qualify for a category-based draw. Consider the pathway recommendations below.
